title: funsearch.review.v1
description: Human (or agent) annotation on an evolved candidate — a free-form comment and optional rating, keyed by candidate_id. Annotate-only: these are notes for the results gallery and do not feed back into the search. Mirrors the kb.review.* pattern.

candidate_id.description: The evolved candidate this comment is about

kernel.description: Kernel/domain (free-form, not enumerated so new kernels need no schema bump)

author.description: Who left the comment (operator, or an agent id)

comment.description: Free-form note on how the procedure is turning out
